description: Create final comprehensive 6-panel summary figure for DCAF12L2 CRL4 substrate receptor evaluation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(18, 12))
fig.suptitle('DCAF12L2 CRL4 Substrate Receptor Prediction: Comprehensive Evidence',
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Layout: 2x3 grid
gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 3, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.35)

# Panel A: Three-way comparison bar chart
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
proteins = ['DCAF12L1\n(Q5VU92)', 'DCAF12L2\n(Q5VW00)']
ddb1_ident = [50, 56]
ddb1_cons = [53, 58]
degron_ident = [91, 100]
overall = [62.5, 66.6]

x = np.arange(len(proteins))
width = 0.2

b1 = ax.bar(x - width*1.5, overall, width, label='Overall identity', color='#95a5a6')
b2 = ax.bar(x - width*0.5, ddb1_cons, width, label='DDB1 interface (conserved)', color='#e74c3c')
b3 = ax.bar(x + width*0.5, degron_ident, width, label='Degron pocket (identical)', color='#2ecc71')

for i in range(len(proteins)):
    ax.text(i - width*1.5, overall[i] + 1, f'{overall[i]:.0f}%', ha='center', fontsize=7)
    ax.text(i - width*0.5, ddb1_cons[i] + 1, f'{ddb1_cons[i]}%', ha='center', fontsize=7)
    ax.text(i + width*0.5, degron_ident[i] + 1, f'{degron_ident[i]}%', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

ax.set_ylabel('Conservation vs DCAF12 (%)')
ax.set_title('A. Selective Conservation Pattern', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(proteins, fontsize=8)
ax.legend(fontsize=7, loc='upper left')
ax.set_ylim(0, 115)
ax.axhline(y=100, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)

# Panel B: DDB1 interface shared changes
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])
ax.axis('off')

shared_changes = """Shared H-box substitutions
(ancestral retrogene changes):

 DCAF12  → L1/L2  Effect
 Y48     → H      Aromatic loss
 L57     → P      Helix-breaker!
 E60     → L      Charge removal
 T61     → Q      Polar change
 V66     → E      Hydrophobic→charged
 H68     → R      Imidazole→guanidinium
 Q74     → R      Amide→charged
 K80     → T      Charge removal
 S428    → W      Ser→Trp (large)
 S429    → P      Ser→Pro
 T431    → M      Thr→Met

These changes occurred BEFORE the
L1/L2 split, indicating systematic
divergence from DDB1 binding."""

ax.text(0.05, 0.95, shared_changes, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8,
        verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fadbd8', alpha=0.9))
ax.set_title('B. Ancestral H-box Changes', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Panel C: Evidence flow diagram (text-based)
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 2])
ax.axis('off')

evidence_text = """EVIDENCE FLOW

WD40 β-propeller fold
  ✓ 7 WD40 repeats (Pfam, InterPro)
  ✓ AlphaFold pLDDT 86.7

Degron-binding pocket
  ✓ 23/23 residues IDENTICAL
  ✓ Both MAGEA3 & CCT5 contacts
  → Substrate recognition: INTACT

YDIR motif (allosteric)
  ✓ Perfectly conserved
  ⚠ NOT at direct DDB1 contact

DDB1-binding H-box helix
  ⚠ 58% conserved (below global 67%)
  ⚠ Shared ancestral L57P change
  ✗ DDB1 never co-purified (0/43)
  → DDB1 binding: UNCERTAIN

CRL4 scaffold association
  ✓ CUL4A (TAP, PMID 21145461)
  ✓ CUL4B (co-IP, PMID 28514442)
  → Complex membership: PARTIAL"""

ax.text(0.05, 0.95, evidence_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=7.5,
        verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#eaf2f8', alpha=0.9))
ax.set_title('C. Evidence Summary', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Panel D: Interaction network
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])

# Simple network diagram showing key interactions
# Central node: DCAF12L2
theta = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 9, endpoint=False)
r_inner = 0.2
r_outer = 0.8

# Center
ax.scatter([0.5], [0.5], s=800, c='#3498db', zorder=5, edgecolors='navy', linewidth=2)
ax.text(0.5, 0.5, 'DCAF12L2', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Interaction partners in a circle
partners = [
    ('CUL4A', '#e74c3c', 0.7),  # CRL4
    ('CUL4B', '#e74c3c', 0.7),
    ('CCT3/5', '#2ecc71', 0.6),
    ('PFDN\n1-6', '#2ecc71', 0.5),
    ('MAGEA6', '#f39c12', 0.6),
    ('DCAF12L1', '#9b59b6', 0.8),
    ('LONP1', '#95a5a6', 0.5),
    ('DDB1', '#bdc3c7', 0.0),  # NOT detected
]

for i, (name, color, conf) in enumerate(partners):
    angle = theta[i]
    x_pos = 0.5 + r_outer * np.cos(angle)
    y_pos = 0.5 + r_outer * np.sin(angle)
    
    if name == 'DDB1':
        # DDB1 - not detected, draw with dashed line
        ax.scatter([x_pos], [y_pos], s=400, c='white', edgecolors='red', 
                  linewidth=2, linestyle='--', zorder=4)
        ax.plot([0.5, x_pos], [0.5, y_pos], 'r--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
        ax.text(x_pos, y_pos, name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6, color='red')
        ax.text(x_pos, y_pos - 0.08, '(NOT detected)', ha='center', fontsize=5, color='red')
    else:
        ax.scatter([x_pos], [y_pos], s=300, c=color, zorder=4, alpha=0.8)
        ax.plot([0.5, x_pos], [0.5, y_pos], color=color, alpha=conf, linewidth=1.5)
        ax.text(x_pos, y_pos, name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6, 
               fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax.set_xlim(-0.4, 1.4)
ax.set_ylim(-0.4, 1.4)
ax.set_aspect('equal')
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title('D. Interaction Network', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Legend for network
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', label='CRL4 scaffold'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2ecc71', label='Chaperonin/prefoldin'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#f39c12', label='DCAF12 substrate'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#9b59b6', label='Paralog'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_patches, fontsize=6, loc='lower left')

# Panel E: GO Decision Table
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax.axis('off')

go_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Status', 'Evidence', 'Action'],
    ['GO:0080008\nCRL4 complex (CC)', 'Existing\n(IBA)', 'CUL4A/B co-purif.\nDDB1 absent', 'Retain IBA\n(appropriate)'],
    ['GO:0043161\nProteasome degr. (BP)', 'Not\nannotated', 'No direct evidence\nDegron pocket intact', 'Do NOT add\n(premature)'],
    ['GO:1990756\nSubstrate adaptor (MF)', 'Not\nannotated', 'Degron pocket 100%\nNo activity data', 'Monitor\n(promising)'],
    ['GO:0140627\nC-end degron (BP)', 'Not\nannotated', 'Pocket conserved\nNo assay data', 'Monitor\n(if confirmed)'],
]

table = ax.table(cellText=go_data[1:], colLabels=go_data[0], loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(7)
table.scale(1, 2.0)

# Color header
for j in range(4):
    table[(0, j)].set_facecolor('#2c3e50')
    table[(0, j)].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Color action cells
colors_action = ['#d5f5e3', '#fadbd8', '#fdebd0', '#fdebd0']
for i in range(4):
    table[(i+1, 3)].set_facecolor(colors_action[i])

ax.set_title('E. GO Curation Decision Table', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

# Panel F: Three alternative models
ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 2])
ax.axis('off')

models_text = """THREE COMPETING MODELS

Model 1: Functional CRL4 receptor
  H-box changes are tolerated
  DDB1 binding weak but sufficient
  → GO:0043161 would apply
  Probability: LOW-MODERATE

Model 2: Substrate-only protein
  Recognizes degrons (pocket intact)
  Cannot assemble CRL4 (DDB1 lost)
  May compete with DCAF12
  → GO:0043161 would NOT apply
  Probability: MODERATE

Model 3: Tissue-specific variant
  Functions in testis/epididymis
  Tissue cofactors compensate
  H-box tolerated in context
  → Context-specific GO:0043161
  Probability: MODERATE

VERDICT: Partially supported
Most informative test: DDB1
binding assay for DCAF12L2"""

ax.text(0.05, 0.95, models_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=7.5,
        verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.9))
ax.set_title('F. Competing Models', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

plt.savefig('dcaf12l2_final_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final comprehensive figure saved")
